mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly reducing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns exceed negative returns in >55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0%, labor market deterioration signals an impending economic slowdown, causing equity markets to price in lower corporate earnings over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, or signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month through earnings growth expectations.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates to immediate positive equity returns over the next week during economic recovery phases.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during recovery periods, or 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with INDPRO growth rates.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth directly correlates with corporate profit expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter as earnings reports confirm macroeconomic strength.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling 3-year windows, or GDP growth fails to predict quarterly equity direction in >65% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly CPI inflation above 200.0 forces expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur in >55% of high-inflation months, or the signal loses predictive power when inflation expectations are anchored.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with stable federal funds rates indicates a soft landing environment, supporting corporate revenue growth and yielding positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint condition produces negative returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for market volatility.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp year-over-year decline in housing starts signals a collapse in residential investment and consumer confidence, dragging down equity markets over the next quarter during housing market downturns.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines by more than 10% year-over-year
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of severe housing start declines, or the signal fails to predict returns outside of housing correction periods.
